text.title: AR Design Patterns Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: select-runtime
step.action: Choose ARKit/ARCore/WebXR/Unity-ARF; lock the gesture grammar baseline.

step.name: screen-inventory
step.action: List screens needing AR; mark anchoring strategy per screen.

step.name: define-grammar
step.action: Adopt platform-native gestures with cross-platform aliases.

step.name: enable-lighting+occlusion
step.action: Configure lighting estimation; enable people occlusion / scene depth on supported devices.

step.name: track-loss-path
step.action: Add reset prompt + state preservation; verify on simulated track-loss.
step.decision-gate: If state cannot be preserved across track loss, redesign feature.
